metadata.description: Mad Minds — the OnlineMinds marketing department's Claude plugin marketplace. Includes onlineminds-marketing (in-house skills, Drive Hub routing, write-action safety gates) and a vendored copy of AgriciDaniel/claude-ads (250+ paid-advertising audit checks across Google, Meta, YouTube, LinkedIn, TikTok, Microsoft, Apple, Amazon).

plugins.name: onlineminds-marketing
plugins.description: OnlineMinds marketing department plugin: shared skills, Mad Minds Drive Hub routing, the personal-vs-shared workflow, write-capable Google/Meta/GTM actions with a non-overridable Tier 1 / Tier 2 spend-gate. Brand-specific values live in account-conventions-live in Drive.

plugins.name: claude-ads
plugins.description: Vendored copy of AgriciDaniel/claude-ads (MIT, upstream v1.7.0). 250+ paid-advertising audit checks across Google, Meta, YouTube, LinkedIn, TikTok, Microsoft, Apple, Amazon. Health Score 0-100, 12 industry templates, parallel audit agents, AI creative generation, PPC math, A/B test design, PDF reports. Analysis-only; for live ad changes use the /ad-actions skill in onlineminds-marketing.
